entries.title: FortiGate Edge Intrusions | Stolen Service Accounts Lead to Rogue Workstations and Deep AD Compromise
entries.summary: FortiGate SSO flaws allows attackers to steal configs, abuse AD creds, deploy RMM tools, and exfiltrate NTDS files.

entries.title: SentinelOne Intelligence Brief: Iranian Cyber Activity Outlook
entries.summary: Iran-linked cyber activity may surge after strikes, targeting US and Israeli sectors; SentinelOne provides intel and urges vigilance.

entries.title: From Access to Execution: Securing Identity in the Age of Autonomous Agents
entries.summary: SentinelOne secures human and non-human identities with continuous behavioral validation across AI, browsers, and endpoints.

entries.title: OneClaw: Discovery and Observability for the Agentic Era
entries.summary: Prompt Security from SentinelOne turns hidden agent activity into clear, actionable governance intelligence with the release of OneClaw.

entries.summary: SentinelOne secures AI from infrastructure to agents, delivering visibility, governance, and control at scale.

entries.title: ClawSec: Hardening OpenClaw Agents from the Inside Out
entries.summary: Learn about how ClawSec, by Prompt Security, secures OpenClaw agents, stopping malicious skills with zero-trust defenses.

entries.title: AI Security, From Data to Runtime: A Holistic Defense Approach
entries.summary: SentinelOne secures AI end-to-end, protecting data, infrastructure, and runtime with Data Security Posture Management (DSPM) capabilities.

entries.title: 12 Months of Fighting Cybercrime & Defending Enterprises | The SentinelLABS 2025 Review
entries.summary: From ransomware repurposed for espionage to increased exploitation of cloud platforms, learn about the key trends from SentinelLABS research in 2025.

entries.title: When Your AI Coding Plugin Starts Picking Your Dependencies: Marketplace Skills and Dependency Hijack in Claude Code
entries.summary: Learn how AI coding assistants managing dependencies via plugins are now creating a new supply-chain risk when automation is compromised.

entries.title: CyberVolk Returns | Flawed VolkLocker Brings New Features With Growing Pains
entries.summary: Deep dive into CyberVolk’s new VolkLocker ransomware-as-a-service, its major design flaw, and what it signals for cyber defenders.
